006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License. */
016package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena;
017
018import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
019
020import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
025
026/**
027 * Stream-based RDF serializer for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * Extends {@link OutputStreamSerializer} and delegates RDF metadata to an internal {@link RdfSerializer}.
031 *
032 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
033 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
034 * </ul>
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
037 *    <li class='link'>{doc jmr.RdfDetails}
038 * </ul>
039 */
040@SuppressWarnings({
041   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
042   "java:S110" // Deep inheritance inherent to the RDF serializer hierarchy.
043})
044public class RdfStreamSerializer extends OutputStreamSerializer implements RdfMetaProvider {
045
046   // Argument name constants
047   private static final String ARG_builder = "builder";
048   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
049
050   /**
051    * Builder class.
052    */
053   @SuppressWarnings({
054      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
055   })
056   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<SELF> {
057
058      private static final Cache<HashKey,RdfStreamSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, RdfStreamSerializer.class).build();
059
060      private String language;
061      private RdfSerializer rdfSerializer;
062
063      /**
064       * Constructor, default settings.
065       */
066      protected Builder() {
067         language = Constants.LANG_RDFTHRIFT;
068      }
069
070      /**
071       * Copy constructor.
072       *
073       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
074       */
075      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
076         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
077         language = copyFrom.language;
078         rdfSerializer = copyFrom.rdfSerializer;
079      }
080
081      /**
082       * Copy constructor.
083       *
084       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
085       */
086      protected Builder(RdfStreamSerializer copyFrom) {
087         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
088         language = copyFrom.language;
089         rdfSerializer = copyFrom.rdfSerializer;
090      }
091
092      /**
093       * RDF language (e.g. {@link Constants#LANG_RDFTHRIFT}, {@link Constants#LANG_RDFPROTO}).
094       *
095       * @param value The RDF language.
096       * @return This object.
097       */
098      public SELF language(String value) {
099         language = value;
100         rdfSerializer = null; // Rebuild on next get
101         return self();
102      }
103
104      @Override
105      public SELF produces(String value) {
106         super.produces(value);
107         return self();
108      }
109
110      @Override
111      public SELF accept(String value) {
112         super.accept(value);
113         return self();
114      }
115
116      @Override
117      public RdfStreamSerializer build() {
118         return cache(CACHE).build(RdfStreamSerializer.class);
119      }
120
121      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
122      public abstract SELF copy();
123
124      @Override
125      public HashKey hashKey() {
126         return HashKey.of(super.hashKey(), language);
127      }
128
129      RdfSerializer getRdfSerializer() {
130         if (rdfSerializer == null)
131            rdfSerializer = RdfSerializer.create().language(language).build();
132         return rdfSerializer;
133      }
134   }
135
136   /**
137    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link RdfStreamSerializer#create()} / {@link RdfStreamSerializer#copy()} path.
138    */
139   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
140
141      DefaultBuilder() {}
142
143      DefaultBuilder(RdfStreamSerializer copyFrom) {
144         super(copyFrom);
145      }
146
147      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
148         super(copyFrom);
149      }
150
151      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
152      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
153         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
154      }
155   }
156
157   /**
158    * Creates a new builder.
159    *
160    * @return A new builder.
161    */
162   @SuppressWarnings({
163      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
164   })
165   public static Builder<?> create() {
166      return new DefaultBuilder();
167   }
168
169   private final String language;
170   private final RdfSerializer rdfSerializer;
171
172   /**
173    * Constructor.
174    *
175    * @param builder The builder.
176    */
177   public RdfStreamSerializer(Builder<?> builder) {
178      super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_builder, builder).produces(getProduces(builder)).accept(getAccept(builder)));
179      language = builder.language;
180      rdfSerializer = builder.getRdfSerializer();
181   }
182
183   private static String getAccept(Builder<?> builder) {
184      if (builder.getAccept() != null)
185         return builder.getAccept();
186      return getProduces(builder);
187   }
188
189   private static String getProduces(Builder<?> builder) {
190      if (builder.getProduces() != null)
191         return builder.getProduces();
192      return switch (builder.language) {
193         case Constants.LANG_RDFTHRIFT -> "application/vnd.apache.thrift.binary";
194         case Constants.LANG_RDFPROTO -> "application/vnd.apache.protobuf";
195         default -> "application/octet-stream";
196      };
197   }
198
199   @Override
200   public Builder<?> copy() {
201      return new DefaultBuilder(this);
202   }
203
204   @Override
205   public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder createSession() {
206      return RdfStreamSerializerSession.create(this);
207   }
208
209   @Override
210   public RdfBeanMeta getRdfBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
211      return rdfSerializer.getRdfBeanMeta(bm);
212   }
213
214   @Override
215   public RdfBeanPropertyMeta getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
216      return rdfSerializer.getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
217   }
218
219   @Override
220   public RdfClassMeta getRdfClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
221      return rdfSerializer.getRdfClassMeta(cm);
222   }
223
224   @Override
225   public XmlBeanMeta getXmlBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
226      return rdfSerializer.getXmlBeanMeta(bm);
227   }
228
229   @Override
230   public XmlBeanPropertyMeta getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
231      return rdfSerializer.getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
232   }
233
234   @Override
235   public XmlClassMeta getXmlClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
236      return rdfSerializer.getXmlClassMeta(cm);
237   }
238
239   /**
240    * Returns the RDF language.
241    *
242    * @return The RDF language identifier.
243    */
244   public String getLanguage() {
245      return language;
246   }
247
248   /**
249    * Returns the delegated RdfSerializer.
250    *
251    * @return The delegated RdfSerializer.
252    */
253   protected RdfSerializer getRdfSerializer() {
254      return rdfSerializer;
255   }
256
257   /**
258    * Collection format - delegates to RdfSerializer.
259    *
260    * @return The RDF collection format.
261    */
262   public RdfCollectionFormat getCollectionFormat() {
263      return rdfSerializer.getCollectionFormat();
264   }
265
266   /**
267    * Juneau namespace - delegates to RdfSerializer.
268    *
269    * @return The Juneau namespace.
270    */
271   public Namespace getJuneauNs() {
272      return rdfSerializer.getJuneauNs();
273   }
274
275   /**
276    * Juneau BP namespace - delegates to RdfSerializer.
277    *
278    * @return The Juneau BP namespace.
279    */
280   public Namespace getJuneauBpNs() {
281      return rdfSerializer.getJuneauBpNs();
282   }
283
284   /**
285    * Namespaces - delegates to RdfSerializer.
286    *
287    * @return The RDF namespaces.
288    */
289   public Namespace[] getNamespaces() {
290      return rdfSerializer.getNamespaces();
291   }
292
293   /**
294    * Add literal types - delegates to RdfSerializer.
295    *
296    * @return True if literal types are added.
297    */
298   public boolean isAddLiteralTypes() {
299      return rdfSerializer.isAddLiteralTypes();
300   }
301
302   /**
303    * Add root property - delegates to RdfSerializer.
304    *
305    * @return True if root property is added.
306    */
307   public boolean isAddRootProp() {
308      return rdfSerializer.isAddRootProp();
309   }
310
311   /**
312    * Loose collections - delegates to RdfSerializer.
313    *
314    * @return True if loose collections are enabled.
315    */
316   public boolean isLooseCollections() {
317      return rdfSerializer.isLooseCollections();
318   }
319
320   /**
321    * Use XML namespaces - delegates to RdfSerializer.
322    *
323    * @return True if XML namespaces are used.
324    */
325   public boolean isUseXmlNamespaces() {
326      return rdfSerializer.isUseXmlNamespaces();
327   }
328
329   /**
330    * Auto-detect namespaces - delegates to RdfSerializer.
331    *
332    * @return True if auto-detect namespaces is enabled.
333    */
334   public boolean isAutoDetectNamespaces() {
335      return rdfSerializer.isAutoDetectNamespaces();
336   }
337
338   @Override
339   protected boolean isAddBeanTypes() {
340      return rdfSerializer.isAddBeanTypes();
341   }
342}
